Check a password View dashboard

📥 Secure Inbox

From: Bank Security <security-alert-update99@gmail.com>

Subject: URGENT: Your account is locked!!!

Dear Customer,

We detected suspicious logins. You must update your password within 24 hours or your money will be frozen forever!

Thank you,
The Bank Support Team

🛡️ Security Lab Panel

Read the email on the left. Can you spot why it is dangerous?

🔍 Threat Analysis:

Click any highlighted item in the email to read the security breakdown.

Phishing Detection Tips

  • Verify sender addresses carefully.
  • Look for urgent or threatening language.
  • Hover over links before clicking.
  • Never share passwords or personal details by email.

Why this matters

Phishing remains one of the most common ways attackers gain access to sensitive accounts and systems. Practicing with realistic examples helps build safer habits.
